sys_ws_operation.name: Get Run Status

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_d48c96ffcf68c3d08935fb251d851ce7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl/><http_method>GET</http_method><name>Get Run Status</name><operation_script><![CDATA[// REST Resource: GET /api/x_snc_airop/assessment/status
// Relative path: /status
// HTTP Method: GET
// Requires authentication: false
//
// Paste this into the Script field of a new resource on AIROP Assessment API

(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
    try {
        var runId = request.queryParams.run_id;
        if (!runId) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ status: 'ERROR', message: 'run_id parameter required' });
            return;
        }

        var run = new GlideRecord('x_snc_airop_assessment_run');
        if (!run.get(runId)) {
            response.setStatus(404);
            response.setBody({ status: 'ERROR', message: 'Run record not found' });
            return;
        }

        response.setStatus(200);
        response.setBody({
            status:        run.getValue('status'),
            overall_score: run.getValue('overall_score'),
            itsm_score:    run.getValue('itsm_score'),
            itom_score:    run.getValue('itom_score'),
            cmdb_score:    run.getValue('cmdb_score'),
            modules:       run.getValue('modules_scanned'),
            name:          run.getDisplayValue('name')
        });

    } catch(e) {
        response.setStatus(500);
        response.setBody({ status: 'ERROR', message: e.toString() });
    }

})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_snc_airop/assessment/status</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/status</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>false</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>false</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>false</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-06 12:46:18</sys_created_on><sys_id>d48c96ffcf68c3d08935fb251d851ce7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Get Run Status</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_d48c96ffcf68c3d08935fb251d851ce7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-06 12:49:18</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="AIROP Assessment API">e00802ffcf6c83d08935fb251d851c43</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
